email_subject: Application for Parttime Online Marketeer (English) - Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Parttime Online Marketeer position at Actief Interim Schoten. With a background in digital marketing, SEO, and web design, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your international team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage on-page SEO, create keyword-targeted content, and build/maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra. I also have hands-on experience with graphic design tools like Canva, which aligns with your requirement for visual content creation. My own project, mirook.com, involved full-cycle website design, SEO, and GEO optimization, demonstrating my ability to handle marketing materials and website updates independently.

I am comfortable working in English, have a strong interest in marketing and communication, and am eager to learn about your sensor technology products. I am available for 16 hours per week with a flexible schedule.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing how I can support your team.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Parttime Online Marketeer (English) position at Actief Interim Schoten. As a junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and content creation, I am drawn to the opportunity to work in a small, international team where I can make a tangible impact.

Currently, at Episto, I manage on-page SEO for client websites, write keyword-targeted blog content, and build/maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra. This role has honed my ability to handle website updates, create marketing materials, and track performance using tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs. I also have experience with graphic design through Canva, which I use to create visuals for social media and web content.

My independent project, mirook.com, allowed me to design and build a multi-page WordPress site from scratch, implement structured data (JSON-LD schema), and run iterative SEO/GEO audits to improve search visibility. This hands-on experience directly aligns with your need for someone to keep the website up-to-date, design visuals and brochures, and manage communication materials.

I am fluent in English, the working language of your multicultural team, and I am eager to learn about your sensor technology products through internal training. I am available for 16 hours per week with a flexible schedule and am open to expanding my role into sales or HR as the company grows.

I would welcome the chance to discuss how my skills can contribute to your team. Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Hands-on experience with graphic design tools (Canva) for creating visuals and marketing materials
• Proficient in WordPress site building and maintenance using Elementor and Astra
• Strong SEO and content writing skills, including keyword research and on-page optimization
• Experience with website updates, social media integration, and performance tracking
• Fluent in English, comfortable in a multicultural environment, and quick to learn new products
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Web Design
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in graphic design, website management, and SEO. At Episto, I run on-page SEO, create keyword-targeted content, and build/maintain WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra. I also design visuals and marketing materials using Canva. On my own project (mirook.com), I handled full-cycle website design, structured data implementation, and social media integration. Comfortable with content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

CORE SKILLS
- Graphic Design: Canva, visual content creation, brochure and marketing material design
- Web & CMS: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, website maintenance
- SEO & Content: on-page SEO, keyword research, SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing
- Analytics & Reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social Media: social media content creation and integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
